'''âd-g-r-dh''' ('''kadagredhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:euthanatise|euthanatise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euthanatise|euthanatise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-g-r-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kadagredhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidagredhoko|thidagredhoko]] || [[word:jidagredhoko|jidagredhoko]] || [[word:shidagredhoko|shidagredhoko]] || [[word:kidagredhoko|kidagredhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudagredhoko|thuthudagredhoko]] || [[word:jujudagredhoko|jujudagredhoko]] || [[word:shushudagredhoko|shushudagredhoko]] || [[word:kukudagredhoko|kukudagredhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodagredhoko|thodagredhoko]] || [[word:jodagredhoko|jodagredhoko]] || [[word:shodagredhoko|shodagredhoko]] || [[word:kodagredhoko|kodagredhoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadagredhoko|thadagredhoko]] || [[word:jadagredhoko|jadagredhoko]] || [[word:shadagredhoko|shadagredhoko]] || [[word:kadagredhoko|kadagredhoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
